broader.creator: Tori | Baker| ‘27 Bride
broader.caption: Let me reintroduce myself, I’m Tori 👋🏽 I’m the owner and baker behind Smiley Sweeties, an at-home bakery based right here in St. Louis, Missouri! I started baking back in 2020 while I was in college, and what began as a hobby turned into a full-blown dessert dream. Fast forward 5 years later, I now offer over 80 different desserts including cookies, cakes, chocolate-covered treats, candies, and more! 🍪🍫🍰 I’m open daily from 8AM–7PM, and yes, I ship cookies, cakes, and other treats nationwide! I’d love to be your go-to baker for all your sweet cravings, special occasions, or just because you deserve dessert. Oh and fair warning… I’m funny too, guys 🤣
